_note: High-water marks + one-line current caveats only (overhaul 9.4 / R5 split, 2026-07-03). The full write history that used to accumulate in these _note fields is preserved verbatim in docs/archive/sync-changelog.md — append new history there, not here.

criteria._note: Owner search band budget.min £300k / max £425k — drives the fetcher's union price floor.

finances._note: Canonical deposit target lives in goal.targetDeposit (2026-06-16 data-contract repair); savings.monthlyAverage recomputed 2026-07-04 for the Jul-2025–Jun-2026 window.

journey_progress._note: Journey tick state ({ tasks: { taskId: true } } vs data/journey.json); 0 rows until first tick.

areas._note: count = directory INDEX entries (villages.csv) = per-area files = DB mirror = 192. The 4 duplicate-postcode variants were removed in the 2026-07-09 audit dedupe (ISSUE_LOG M2; Charlwood's canonical is now the geographically-correct SO24 record). 192/192 researched, zero missing content fields. Household-onboarding stubs are never materialised.

goals._note: Readiness checklist blob retired — source is the readiness_checklist table. deposit.currentSavings/gapToHoped recalibrated 2026-07-04 to the live £34,472.19 deposit-eligible total.

investments_accounts._note: Owner T212 S&S ISA updated from the 2026-07-04 activity statement — account value £34,472.19, per-holding values verified.

investments_history._note: Owner rows through 2026-07 (2026-06 is a statement-derived reconciliation month; 2026-07 partial).

debts_credit_cards._note: 1 row (entered via MCP); no app UI yet.

debts_student_loans._note: Empty — no student loan debt entered; no app UI yet.

debts_other._note: Empty — no other debts entered; no app UI yet.

listing_reactions._note: Append-only reaction log — Supabase always wins; snapshot pulled live via MCP, never written back. Untagged legacy rejects are non-training (reactions.js#isUnattributedReject).

learned_preferences._note: Distilled weights, one row/household (derived from the reaction log + overrides + dismissals; overrides.__refinement_hidden is the reserved display-hide key). Recomputed user-state — Supabase wins.

household_areas._note: Relational per-household area selection (PK household_id+area_id), composed by storage.js#getHouseholdAreas; owner household seeded with the full curated catalog; members may INSERT only household-onboarding stubs. is_origin column dropped 2026-07-09 (ADR 0009); Botley/Curbridge/Curdridge stubs added + linked the same day.

area_confirmations._note: Per-household location-review confirmations blob ({ confirmed: { areaId: isoTimestamp } }), one row/household.

ask_conversations._note: Assistant chat threads (messages jsonb); browser-owned persistence via storage/ask.js; the ask Edge Function only READS user state.

listings._note: Fetcher-written live content — NOT git-synced, never mirrored by Claude; maintained by the fetch/purge/backfill tools.
